category: API Gateways Docs and Developer Experience
description: API gateway/management platforms, API documentation tools, and SDK/client generation utilities.

entries.name: Kong
entries.summary: API gateway and marketplace for managing public and private APIs, with a strong open-source core.
entries.freeTier: Kong Gateway (OSS) is fully free; Konnect cloud has a free tier for small workloads.
entries.paidFrom: Konnect plans billed on usage beyond free tier.

entries.name: Apidog
entries.summary: All-in-one API design, documentation, mocking, and testing tool with key authentication, rate limiting, and monetization features.
entries.freeTier: Free plan: up to 10 projects, 1M monthly requests, 10GB egress.
entries.paidFrom: Paid plans add team collaboration and higher quotas.

entries.name: ReadMe
entries.summary: Beautiful, interactive API documentation hubs with built-in API explorer and changelogs.
entries.freeTier: Free plan available for open-source projects.

entries.name: Swagger / SwaggerHub
entries.summary: OpenAPI tooling for designing, documenting, and testing REST APIs, including the widely used Swagger UI.
entries.freeTier: Swagger Editor/UI tools fully free and open source; SwaggerHub has a free tier for individuals.

entries.name: Stoplight
entries.summary: API design platform with visual OpenAPI editing, mocking, and style-guide linting.
entries.freeTier: Free tier for individuals with limited projects.

entries.name: Mintlify
entries.summary: Modern documentation platform with a beautiful default theme, built for developer-facing docs sites.

entries.name: Docusaurus
entries.summary: Meta's open-source static site generator purpose-built for documentation sites, with versioning and i18n support.
entries.freeTier: Completely free, open source; deploy anywhere (e.g., GitHub Pages, Vercel, Netlify free tiers).

entries.name: newreleases.io
entries.summary: Tracks new releases across GitHub, GitLab, PyPI, npm, RubyGems, NuGet, Cargo, Docker Hub, and more, with webhook/chat alerts.
entries.freeTier: Free tier with limited tracked projects and notification channels.
entries.paidFrom: Premium plan billed monthly for more tracked projects.
